description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named feedparser that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: code and docs. The code job runs on a matrix of Python versions and operating systems, checking out the repo, setting up Python, caching the virtual environment, creating a virtual environment if necessary, and running tox. The docs job runs on ubuntu-latest, checking out the repo, setting up Python 3.9, caching the virtual environment, creating a virtual environment if necessary, and testing the building of documentation with tox.
